task_completion.description: Check in the stolen laptop (ASSET-L007) from David Kim
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a check-in confirmation message for ASSET-L007, or the asset details/list showing that ASSET-L007 is no longer deployed/checked out to David Kim.

task_completion.description: Update the stolen laptop's status to 'Lost/Stolen'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the status badge or field for ASSET-L007 displaying 'Lost/Stolen' in the asset list or asset details page.

task_completion.description: Add the required security incident note to the stolen laptop
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the exact note 'SECURITY INCIDENT #SI-2025-0042: Reported stolen on 2025-03-06. Police report filed. Remote wipe initiated.' in the check-in confirmation, asset history, or notes section for ASSET-L007.

task_completion.description: Check out the replacement MacBook Pro 16 (ASSET-L009) to David Kim
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a checkout confirmation message for ASSET-L009, or the asset list/details showing ASSET-L009 is now deployed/assigned to David Kim (dkim).

task_completion.description: Add the required checkout note to the replacement laptop
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the note 'Emergency replacement for stolen device - SI-2025-0042' in the checkout confirmation screen, asset history, or recent activity log for ASSET-L009.

task_completion.description: Create a new asset to track the insurance claim
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a success message indicating a new asset was created, or the presence of a newly added asset in the main Snipe-IT asset list.

task_completion.description: Verify the new insurance asset has the correct Asset Tag
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the newly created asset having the exact Asset Tag 'ASSET-L012' in the asset creation form, success message, or asset list.

task_completion.description: Ensure no unintended assets were modified
task_completion.visual_evidence: Review the recent activity log or asset list to ensure only ASSET-L007, ASSET-L009, and ASSET-L012 were interacted with, and no other assets were accidentally checked in, checked out, or altered.

integrity.description: The agent used the Snipe-IT web GUI to perform the tasks
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the Snipe-IT web interface in a browser, rather than using terminal commands (like curl or direct database queries) to manipulate the system.

integrity.description: The agent entered the required notes and details into the actual application forms
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the text being typed or pasted into the Snipe-IT input fields (e.g., Notes, Asset Tag), not just displayed in a separate text editor or terminal window.

integrity.description: The application state appears genuine without DOM manipulation
integrity.visual_evidence: The Snipe-IT interface should look standard without signs of browser developer tools being used to fake success messages or alter text on the screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Victim User: David Kim (username: dkim). Stolen Asset Tag: ASSET-L007. Replacement Asset Tag: ASSET-L009. Insurance Asset Tag: ASSET-L012. Incident ID: SI-2025-0042. The task requires ASSET-L007 to be checked in, marked 'Lost/Stolen', and annotated with a specific incident note. ASSET-L009 must be checked out to David Kim with an emergency replacement note. A new asset must be created with the tag ASSET-L012.
